description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white with sections of horizontal wooden paneling that add warmth and contrast. Large floor-to-ceiling windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The structure includes two prominent overhanging sections, creating sheltered outdoor spaces or carports beneath. The layout appears to be multi-roomed, with clear separations between living areas and private quarters. The overall impression is of a spacious, upscale urban residence with minimalist detailing and open-plan possibilities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white walls, wooden accents, and large asymmetrical windows, featuring overhanging sections and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large overhangs, and a balanced arrangement of windows and wooden panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left overhang, vertical wooden slats, and multiple large windows on both levels.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back overhang, more window placements, and the boxy, cantilevered structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the right overhang, additional windows, and the interplay of white and wood surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under an overhang, featuring a large glass door and minimalistic detailing, with no visible steps or porch.
